title: pavonia nepetifolia
intro: Pavonia nepetifolia, also known as rose mallow or swamp mallow, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Pavonia nepetifolia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
